Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase rate of fire by 10%. Improves guidance.Homing Missle SmallSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 25%. Increase speed by 5%.Homing Missle SmallSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 54%. Improves blast radius.Homing Missle Small lvl 3Steel x1600n/a
4Increase rate of fire by 30%. Improves guidance.Homing Missle Small lvl 3Steel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase damage by 62%. Increase range by 10%.Homing Missle Small lvl 3Steel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 140%. Increase speed by 25%. Improves blast radius. Greatly improves guidance.Homing Missle Small lvl 6Steel x12800Iridium x800
